# Map of the Campus

Map of the Bocconi Campus buildings described in the virtual exhibition, from Via Statuto to the New Campus area.

Color legend:

- black = Via Statuto (1902)

- green= Sarfatti 25 (1941)

- purple= Bocconi 12, Gobbi 1, Gobbi 5 (1956-1965)

- red= Sraffa 13, Röntgen 1, Sarfatti 10 (1985-2019)

You can download an audio guide directly to your smartphone via the free app available at this [link](http://direct.hearonymus.com/guide/1203)
